The Super CX is the lightest stainless steel spoke ever developed for extra light wheels. A new class of stainless steel allows Sapim to further reduce the spoke dimensions while increasing and improving fatigue strength. The aerodynamic shape allows the Super CX to be secured against rotation during assembly.
Features of the Sapim Super CX-Ray spokes.
No more additional hub hole design; hub manufacturer's warranty is not affected.
Aerodynamic, elliptical spoke.
Made of high-strength, fatigue-resistant 18/8 stainless steel that meets Sapim's quality standards.
Special alloy treatment and sophisticated production.
